compiled_state.title: Contract: coverage-harness-output signal emit/parse interface
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Requirement
Exemption: static assets only / non-executable instruction file. Test verifies structural contract schema via grep for required fields.

## Implementation Notes
Create `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/coverage-harness-output.md` defining:
- Signal name: `COVERAGE_RESULT`
- Emitter: `tests/scripts/test-818-coverage-harness.sh`
- Parser: epic-closure SC9 gate in `plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md`
- Fields: `preventions_count` (integer), `corpus_size` (integer), `threshold` (integer, pinned at 100), `passed` (boolean), `run_at` (ISO timestamp), `corpus_fixture_path` (string)
- Format: one-line `COVERAGE_RESULT: {"preventions_count": N, "corpus_size": 818, "threshold": 100, "passed": true|false, "run_at": "...", "corpus_fixture_path": "..."}` emitted to stdout
- Example payload documented
Also create `.test-index` entry mapping the contract to a structural test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract file exists at canonical path
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/coverage-harness-output.md
- [ ] Contract defines COVERAGE_RESULT signal name
  Verify: grep -q 'COVERAGE_RESULT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/coverage-harness-output.md
- [ ] Contract defines preventions_count, corpus_size, threshold, passed fields
  Verify: grep -q 'preventions_count' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/coverage-harness-output.md && grep -q 'corpus_size' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/coverage-harness-output.md
- [ ] .test-index entry added for contract file
  Verify: grep -q 'coverage-harness-output.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
